message:
Command `# Get the versions for all NC IPs we need
for ip in NC_XIP NC_AMBA NC_COMMON NC_GPIO NC_UART NC_SPI NC_I2C NC_TMR NC_PWM NC_DMAC NC_CRC NC_AES NC_WWDT NC_RTC NC_SYSTICK NC_RV32; do
    ver=$(ls /nc/ip/$ip/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    echo "$ip: $ver"
done
echo "---CF_SRAM---"
ls /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments:
{"command": "# Get the versions for all NC IPs we need
for ip in NC_XIP NC_AMBA NC_COMMON NC_GPIO NC_UART NC_SPI NC_I2C NC_TMR NC_PWM NC_DMAC NC_CRC NC_AES NC_WWDT NC_RTC NC_SYSTICK NC_RV32; do
    ver=$(ls /nc/ip/$ip/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    echo "$ip: $ver"
done
echo "---CF_SRAM---"
ls /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:
NC_XIP: v1.6.0
NC_AMBA: v1.1.0
NC_COMMON: v1.6.0
NC_GPIO: v1.6.0
NC_UART: v1.6.0
NC_SPI: v1.6.0
NC_I2C: v1.6.0
NC_TMR: v1.6.0
NC_PWM: v2.6.0
NC_DMAC: v1.6.0
NC_CRC: v1.6.0
NC_AES: v1.6.0
NC_WWDT: v1.6.0
NC_RTC: v1.6.0
NC_SYSTICK: v1.0.0
NC_RV32: v1.1.0
---CF_SRAM---
v2.2.0-nc

extras.command:
# Get the versions for all NC IPs we need
for ip in NC_XIP NC_AMBA NC_COMMON NC_GPIO NC_UART NC_SPI NC_I2C NC_TMR NC_PWM NC_DMAC NC_CRC NC_AES NC_WWDT NC_RTC NC_SYSTICK NC_RV32; do
    ver=$(ls /nc/ip/$ip/ 2>/dev/null | head -1)
    echo "$ip: $ver"
done
echo "---CF_SRAM---"
ls /nc/ip/CF_SRAM_1024x32/
